title: schefflera cavaleriei
intro: Schefflera cavaleriei, also known as the Umbrella Tree or Chinese Parasol, is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae, native to China. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Schefflera cavaleriei include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Schefflera cavaleriei include decoctions, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
